# Official Angular Best-Practice Sources (Imported)

This skill is based on official Angular guidance:

- Angular Style Guide: https://angular.dev/style-guide
- Source markdown for style guide:
  https://raw.githubusercontent.com/angular/angular/main/adev/src/content/best-practices/style-guide.md

Imported guidance areas used by this skill:

- Naming conventions (kebab-case files, `.spec.ts` tests)
- Project structure by feature area
- One concept per file
- Dependency injection preference (`inject()`)
- Template complexity guidance
- `protected`/`readonly` member recommendations
- `class`/`style` over `ngClass`/`ngStyle`
